[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001000 1
1 1000000 1
2 0000011 2
3 0000000 a
4 0000011 2
5 1100100 3
6 0110111 5
7 0110111 5

01 10 0010000 1
12 21 0000000 a match 3
23 32 0000000 a match 3
34 43 0100100 2
45 54 0110111 5 match 6 7
56 65 0010100 2
67 76 0010000 1
70 07 0010001 2

02 20 0000011 2 match 2 4
13 31 1000000 1 match 1
24 42 0000011 2 match 2 4
35 53 0100100 2
46 64 0010100 2
57 75 0010001 2
60 06 0010100 2
71 17 1010000 2

36 63 0000100 1

50 05 0010111 4
61 16 0010000 1
72 27 0000001 1

15 51 0010000 1
26 62 0000000 a match 3
37 73 1000000 1 match 1
